entries.reason: System monthly cron/batch job aggregates visitRecord/prescriptionIntake/conferenceNote rows across all orgs, keyed/grouped by org_id (in-memory aggregation + per-org settings upsert); no cross-tenant leak because output is partitioned per org_id.
entries.plannedAction: Keep cross-org aggregation; consider a dedicated cross-org read seam if the batch surface grows.

entries.reason: Job-failure admin/owner notification lookup (membership); org_id filter is applied conditionally via member-access (membershipFilter.org_id = orgId) when a job orgId is present, else intentionally cross-org, and dispatch re-enters withOrgContext(row.org_id) per org.
entries.plannedAction: Inline the org_id filter into the where literal (or route through withOrgContext) so the org scope is statically verifiable when a job orgId is present.

entries.reason: externalAccessGrant lookup by globally-unique token_hash (id-then-org-recheck); the fetched grant.org_id is verified against the signed token payload immediately after, so it is not a where org_id filter but is org-checked before use.
entries.plannedAction: Keep the token_hash lookup global; the post-fetch org_id equality check enforces tenant scope.
